title.zh: Agility拟以25亿美元SPAC上市，仓储人形机器人进入资本验证阶段
title.en: Agility plans a $2.5bn SPAC listing, moving warehouse humanoids into a capital-market test

summary.zh: Agility Robotics计划通过Churchill Capital Corp. XI合并上市，估值约25亿美元，预计获得超过6亿美元资金。核心信号不是“人形机器人突然成熟”，而是仓储、制造和物流场景开始把安全、产能、客户订单和单位经济性放到同一张资本市场答卷里。
summary.en: Agility Robotics plans to go public through a merger with Churchill Capital Corp. XI at an implied value of about $2.5bn, with more than $600m of expected proceeds. The signal is not that humanoids are suddenly mature; it is that warehouse, manufacturing, and logistics users are now asking safety, production capacity, customer demand, and unit economics to stand up in one capital-market test.

watch.zh: 接下来要看Digit量产良率、真实工时替代率、现场安全认证，以及Amazon、Toyota、Schaeffler等客户是否扩大部署。
watch.en: Watch Digit production yield, real labour-substitution hours, field safety certification, and whether customers such as Amazon, Toyota, and Schaeffler expand deployment.

liveUpdates.reference: Wall Street Journal, Agility, Maker of Humanlike Robots, to Go Public in $2.5 Billion SPAC Deal, 2026-06-24

referenceLinks.label: WSJ: Agility to go public in $2.5bn SPAC deal

title.zh: Nvidia推出机器人安全软件，物理AI竞争从模型扩展到认证体系
title.en: Nvidia launches robotics safety software, shifting physical-AI competition toward certification systems

summary.zh: Nvidia推出Halos for Robotics，把软件、算力、传感器与检查流程组合成面向人形机器人的安全系统。对行业的含义是，物理AI的护城河正在从“能不能动作”转向“能否在有人环境中被验证、被审计、被保险和被规模化采购”。
summary.en: Nvidia introduced Halos for Robotics, combining software, compute, sensors, and inspection capability into a safety system for humanoid robots. The industry signal is that the moat in physical AI is moving from whether a robot can perform a task to whether it can be verified, audited, insured, and purchased at scale for human-occupied workplaces.

watch.zh: 观察首批采用者是否把Halos写入采购规范，以及汽车自动驾驶安全方法能否迁移到工厂和仓储机器人。
watch.en: Watch whether early adopters write Halos into procurement specifications and whether autonomous-vehicle safety methods transfer to factories and warehouses.

liveUpdates.reference: Axios, Nvidia debuts AI humanoid software to advance robotics safety, 2026-06-22

referenceLinks.label: Axios: Nvidia debuts AI humanoid software

title.zh: Micron财报成为AI硬件行情压力测试，内存短缺继续牵动算力扩张
title.en: Micron earnings become a stress test for the AI-hardware trade as memory scarcity drives compute expansion

summary.zh: 市场在6月24日等待Micron财报，重点不是单家公司业绩，而是HBM、DRAM和SSD能否继续支撑AI数据中心扩张。Micron刚宣布与Anthropic合作供应内存和存储，说明模型公司正在把关键硬件供应链纳入长期基础设施安排。
summary.en: Markets are watching Micron’s June 24 earnings not just as a single-company result, but as a test of whether HBM, DRAM, and SSD supply can keep supporting AI data-centre expansion. Micron’s new partnership with Anthropic shows model developers increasingly treating memory and storage as long-term infrastructure rather than commodity inputs.

watch.zh: 重点看HBM定价、长期供货合约、先进封装瓶颈，以及财报是否验证AI支出仍能转化为真实订单。
watch.en: Focus on HBM pricing, long-term supply agreements, advanced-packaging bottlenecks, and whether earnings confirm that AI capex is still becoming real orders.

liveUpdates.reference: MarketWatch, Micron stock momentum builds as the company inks a new Anthropic partnership, 2026-06-22; MarketWatch live coverage, 2026-06-24

title.zh: PBEE下一步：把失效概率、损伤记忆和恢复过程合成一个动力系统
title.en: The next PBEE step is to model failure probability, damage memory, and recovery as one dynamical system

evidence.zh: 研究类型：2026预印本；方法：连续时间马尔可夫链、瞬态失效概率、可靠指标与震后恢复状态转移。
evidence.en: Evidence: 2026 preprint using continuous-time Markov chains, transient failure probabilities, reliability indices, and post-earthquake recovery state transitions.

summary.zh: 这篇研究把性能化抗震工程从“地震后再评估恢复力”推进到“把损伤累积与恢复过程直接嵌入状态转移”。对结构工程师的价值在于，它把可靠度、停运时间和恢复能力放进同一套可计算框架，避免只用一次性超越概率描述长期风险。未来更有竞争力的抗震方案，可能不仅要说明构件是否满足极限状态，还要说明系统在反复地震和维修干预后如何演化。对职业发展而言，可靠度、韧性和运维数据将越来越难分开。
summary.en: This study moves performance-based earthquake engineering from treating recovery as a post-event add-on to embedding damage accumulation and recovery directly into state transitions. For structural engineers, the value is that reliability, downtime, and recoverability can be discussed within one computable framework instead of relying only on one-time exceedance probabilities. More competitive seismic design will increasingly need to show not only whether members satisfy limit states, but also how the system evolves under repeated earthquakes and repair interventions. Professionally, reliability, resilience, and operational data are becoming inseparable.

caveat.zh: 当前案例仍偏方法验证，复杂建筑群、社会恢复耦合和资产组合级决策还需要更多实证校准。
caveat.en: The current examples remain method-oriented; complex portfolios, social-recovery coupling, and asset-level decision rules still need stronger empirical calibration.

insights.reference: Nardin, Marelli, Sudret and Broccardo, arXiv:2606.12448, submitted 2026-05-30

referenceLinks.label: arXiv: Reliability and resilience in PBEE

title.zh: 城市结构损伤可能有“相变”：中等地震下风险不是线性增加
title.en: Urban structural damage may show phase transitions, so risk does not rise linearly under moderate earthquakes

evidence.zh: 研究类型：2026预印本；方法：随机场Ising模型、城市建筑组合、损伤聚集与自然灾害风险指标偏差分析。
evidence.en: Evidence: 2026 preprint using a random-field Ising model, urban building portfolios, damage clustering, and bias analysis of natural-hazard risk metrics.

summary.zh: 这项研究把城市建筑损伤解释为集体行为：当灾害强度提高时，系统可能从“大部分安全”突然跳到“大范围受损”，而建筑类型多样性会改变这种跃迁的陡峭程度。它对结构与城市风险工作的启发很直接：如果只把每栋楼当成独立样本，可能低估中等地震下的损伤同步性和修复成本。未来做区域评估、保险定价或韧性规划时，建筑组合的相关性、空间聚集和模型不确定性应当被显式表达，而不是被平均值掩盖。
summary.en: This work treats urban structural damage as a collective phenomenon: as hazard intensity rises, a city may move abruptly from mostly safe to widely damaged, while portfolio diversity changes the sharpness of that transition. The implication for structural and urban-risk practice is direct: if buildings are treated as independent samples, synchronized damage and repair costs under moderate earthquakes may be underestimated. Future regional assessment, insurance pricing, and resilience planning will need to express portfolio correlation, spatial clustering, and modelling uncertainty explicitly rather than hiding them inside averages.

caveat.zh: 相变类比有解释力，但落到具体城市仍需要高质量建筑清单、场地效应、脆弱性曲线与灾后损伤数据校准。
caveat.en: The phase-transition analogy is useful, but application to a specific city still requires strong building inventories, site effects, fragility curves, and post-event damage calibration.

insights.reference: Oh, Zhao, Rincon, Padgett and Wang, arXiv:2602.16195, submitted 2026-02-18

referenceLinks.label: arXiv: Phase transitions in collective damage of civil structures

title.zh: AI数据中心已经成为土木与电力系统共同问题，不再只是IT设施问题
title.en: AI data centres are now a civil-and-power-system problem, not only an IT-facility problem

evidence.zh: 研究类型：2026综述预印本；方法：AI数据中心负荷行为、电力供应配置、碳排机制、灵活性与辅助服务潜力分析。
evidence.en: Evidence: 2026 review preprint on AI data-centre load behaviour, power-supply configurations, carbon mechanisms, flexibility, and ancillary-service potential.

summary.zh: 这篇综述把AI数据中心放入电力系统可持续性框架，讨论负荷增长、清洁能源匹配、碳核算、区域电网约束和需求侧灵活性。对结构和土木方向的启发是，未来大型算力园区并不是简单的机房设计，而是变电站、冷却、备用电源、给排水、场地许可、抗灾韧性和运营碳管理的复合基础设施。工程师如果只懂单体结构，会错过项目早期最关键的约束；能同时理解结构、安全、能源与审批的人，会更接近项目决策层。
summary.en: This review places AI data centres inside a power-system sustainability framework, covering load growth, clean-energy matching, carbon accounting, regional grid constraints, and demand-side flexibility. For structural and civil engineers, the message is that large compute campuses are not merely server-room projects; they combine substations, cooling, backup power, water systems, permitting, disaster resilience, and operational carbon management. Engineers who only understand the individual building may miss the binding constraints at project inception; those who can connect structure, safety, energy, and approvals will sit closer to the decision layer.

caveat.zh: 论文关注系统层面，具体项目仍需当地电价、并网容量、水资源、噪声、消防和规划审批条件共同校核。
caveat.en: The paper is system-level; project decisions still require local checks on tariffs, interconnection capacity, water, noise, fire safety, and planning approvals.

insights.reference: Huang, Deb and Zareipour, arXiv:2606.21064, submitted 2026-06-19

referenceLinks.label: arXiv: AI Data Centers and Power System Sustainability

title.zh: 风荷载基本量：为什么中外规范都从速度压力开始，但设计语境不同？
title.en: Wind-load fundamentals: why do Chinese and international codes start from velocity pressure but use different design language?

text.zh: 风荷载对比最容易出现误解的地方，是把“风速”“风压”“体型系数”和“高度变化”混在一起比较。中国、澳洲、美国和欧洲规范都承认同一个基本物理：流体动压与空气密度及风速平方相关。但工程表达并不相同。中国规范常以基本风压和高度变化系数为入口；澳洲规范把区域风速、方向、地形、屏蔽和地貌等因素逐层修正为设计风速，再进入压力计算；美国ASCE体系强调速度压力、方向性、暴露类别、地形与阵风效应；欧洲体系则通过平均风速、湍流强度和峰值速度压力表达。跨规范复核时，不能只比较一个数字，而要追踪“风速定义、平均时间、重现期、地貌/暴露、峰值处理、系数位置”是否对应。
text.en: Wind-load comparisons are often confused because wind speed, wind pressure, shape coefficients, and height variation are compared as if they were the same quantity. Chinese, Australian, US, and European codes share the same physical basis: dynamic pressure is related to air density and the square of wind speed. Their engineering language, however, differs. Chinese practice often enters through basic wind pressure and height-related modification factors. Australian practice progressively modifies regional wind speed through direction, terrain, shielding, and topographic factors before calculating pressure. ASCE 7 emphasises velocity pressure, directionality, exposure category, topography, and gust effects. Eurocode expresses the problem through mean wind velocity, turbulence intensity, and peak velocity pressure. In a cross-code review, the task is not to compare one number, but to trace whether wind-speed definition, averaging time, return period, exposure, peak treatment, and coefficient placement are genuinely equivalent.

text.zh: GB 50009的常见设计语言是先确定基本风压，再通过高度变化系数、体型系数、风振系数等把场地和结构效应引入。这个路径适合审查图纸和计算书，因为能直接看到基本风压取值、地面粗糙度、高度修正和体型分区是否一致。
text.en: GB 50009 commonly starts from basic wind pressure and then introduces site and structural effects through height-variation, shape, and dynamic-response factors. This route is efficient for drawing and calculation review because the basic pressure, terrain roughness, height correction, and pressure-zone assumptions are visible.

text.zh: AS/NZS 1170.2更强调先把区域风速修正为某一方向和高度的设计风速，再用空气密度项和气动系数求压力。它的优势是把地形、地貌、屏蔽和方向效应的来源拆得很清楚，适合复杂场地和风向敏感结构。
text.en: AS/NZS 1170.2 more explicitly modifies regional wind speed into a design wind speed for a given direction and height before pressure is calculated using air density and aerodynamic coefficients. Its strength is the transparent separation of terrain, shielding, topography, and direction effects, which is useful for complex sites and direction-sensitive structures.

text.zh: ASCE 7通过速度压力qz组织风荷载，再把方向性、暴露、地形和阵风系数纳入；EN 1991-1-4则用峰值速度压力qp(z)把平均风与湍流放在同一表达里。两者都不是简单“风速平方乘常数”，而是把统计风环境和结构气动响应分层表达。
text.en: ASCE 7 organises wind loading through velocity pressure qz and then applies directionality, exposure, topography, and gust effects. EN 1991-1-4 uses peak velocity pressure qp(z) to combine mean wind and turbulence in one expression. Neither is merely “wind speed squared times a constant”; both layer statistical wind climate and structural aerodynamic response.

takeaway.zh: 做中外风荷载复核时，先建立一张量纲和定义对照表，再比较压力结果。尤其要标明风速平均时间、设计重现期、地貌/暴露类别、空气密度假定、峰值或阵风处理，以及体型系数是否已经包含局部压力效应。
takeaway.en: For cross-code wind review, build a definition-and-units table before comparing pressures. State the wind-speed averaging time, return period, terrain or exposure class, air-density assumption, peak or gust treatment, and whether shape coefficients already include local pressure effects.

title.zh: 实例：40 m/s 设计风速下，速度压力量级如何在不同规范语言中表达
title.en: Example: how velocity-pressure magnitude is expressed under a 40 m/s design wind speed

intro.zh: 为说明量级，取设计风速 V = 40 m/s，空气密度 ρ = 1.2 kg/m³。示例只比较速度压力入口，不替代完整风荷载设计；实际工程还必须加入方向、地形、地貌/暴露、体型、阵风、内压、局部构件与可靠度水平。
intro.en: For magnitude only, take design wind speed V = 40 m/s and air density ρ = 1.2 kg/m³. The example compares the velocity-pressure entry point only and does not replace a full wind design; real projects must still include direction, topography, terrain or exposure, shape, gust, internal pressure, local components, and reliability level.

citation.zh: 基础关系：伯努利动压表达式；工程流体力学通用关系（非规范条文）
citation.en: Basis: Bernoulli dynamic-pressure relation; standard engineering-fluid-mechanics relation (not a code clause)

result.zh: q = 0.5 × 1.2 × 40² = 960 N/m² = 0.96 kPa。这个值只是速度压力基准，还不是构件最终设计风压。
result.en: q = 0.5 × 1.2 × 40² = 960 N/m² = 0.96 kPa. This is only the velocity-pressure baseline, not the final design pressure on a member.

result.zh: 若只为量级比较取 Cfig = 1.0、Cdyn = 1.0，则 p ≈ 0.96 kPa。实际设计中 Vdes,θ 已包含方向、高度和场地修正，Cfig 与 Cdyn 不能省略。
result.en: If Cfig = 1.0 and Cdyn = 1.0 are used only for magnitude comparison, p ≈ 0.96 kPa. In real design, Vdes,θ already contains direction, height, and site modifiers, and Cfig and Cdyn must not be omitted.

equations.formula: qz = 0.00256 Kz Kzt Kd Ke V²

citation.zh: 规范出处：ASCE/SEI 7-22，式(26.10-1)；该式采用英制单位，V单位为mph，qz单位为psf。
citation.en: Code reference: ASCE/SEI 7-22, Eq. (26.10-1); the equation is in US customary units, with V in mph and qz in psf.

result.zh: ASCE公式不能直接代入40 m/s；需先换算 V = 89.5 mph，并按暴露、高度、方向和地形取K系数。若各K示意取1.0，则 qz ≈ 20.5 psf ≈ 0.98 kPa。
result.en: The ASCE equation cannot take 40 m/s directly; first convert V = 89.5 mph and select K factors for exposure, height, directionality, and topography. If all K factors are illustratively set to 1.0, qz ≈ 20.5 psf ≈ 0.98 kPa.

result.zh: 若只看平均风速项，0.5ρvm² = 0.96 kPa；但Eurocode的qp(z)还乘以[1 + 7Iv(z)]，所以峰值速度压力通常高于平均动压。
result.en: If only the mean-wind term is considered, 0.5ρvm² = 0.96 kPa; however, Eurocode qp(z) also multiplies by [1 + 7Iv(z)], so peak velocity pressure is normally higher than mean dynamic pressure.

note.zh: 同样40 m/s风速会给出约0.96 kPa的基本动压量级，但各规范的设计压力不应因此被认为相同。真正需要复核的是这个40 m/s在各体系中代表什么统计风速，以及后续系数是否已经包含峰值、阵风、体型、局部压力和可靠度调整。
note.en: The same 40 m/s wind speed gives a basic dynamic-pressure magnitude of about 0.96 kPa, but the design pressures in different codes should not therefore be treated as identical. The real review question is what statistical wind speed the 40 m/s represents in each system, and whether later coefficients already include peak, gust, shape, local pressure, and reliability adjustments.

classroom.references: GB 50009-2012; AS/NZS 1170.2:2021; ASCE/SEI 7-22; EN 1991-1-4:2005+A1:2010; Engineering ToolBox, Dynamic Pressure
